creator: jbw@hilltopgroup.com
text:
I'm having the same issue on FreeBSD 12 and gitea 1.8.1.

The issue seems to be in the daemonization within the rc script.

# /usr/sbin/daemon -S -l daemon -s debug -T gitea -u git -p /var/run/gitea.pid /usr/bin/env -i 'GITEA_WORK_DIR=/usr/local/share/gitea' 'GITEA_CUSTOM=/usr/local/etc/gitea' 'HOME=/usr/local/git' 'PATH=/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin' 'USER=git' /usr/local/sbin/gitea web 

exits with no error or output, and nothing in the log.

However, when I run:
# su git
$ /usr/bin/env -i 'GITEA_WORK_DIR=/usr/local/share/gitea' 'GITEA_CUSTOM=/usr/local/etc/gitea' 'HOME=/usr/local/git' 'PATH=/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin' 'USER=git' /usr/local/sbin/gitea web

It works just fine.
